Provides tools for constructing, computing, and using distance measures
for numerical, categorical, and mixed-type data. The package implements
a flexible framework in which continuous and categorical components can
be combined under additive, commensurable, and association-aware
specifications. Supported methods include classical distances such as
Gower, Euclidean, Manhattan, and Mahalanobis-type distances; categorical
dissimilarities such as simple matching, occurrence-frequency, and
association-based measures; and mixed-type presets designed to reduce
biases due to variable type, scale, distribution, redundancy, and number
of categories. The package also provides scaling options, supervised and
unsupervised distance constructions, leave-one-variable-out tools for
distance-based variable importance, and integration with distance-based
learning workflows such as nearest-neighbour prediction, partitioning
around medoids, and spectral clustering. Methods are motivated by van de
Velden, Iodice D'Enza, Markos, and Cavicchia (2026)
\<[doi:10.1080/10618600.2026.2680181](https://doi.org/10.1080/10618600.2026.2680181)\>
and related work on categorical and mixed-type dissimilarities.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`all_dist_method_specs()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/all_dist_method_specs.md)
  : Create a grid of \`mdist()\` method specifications
- [`benchmark_mdist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/benchmark_mdist.md)
  : Benchmark \`mdist()\` over multiple method specifications
- [`compare_lovo_mdist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/compare_lovo_mdist.md)
  : Compare LOVO diagnostics across multiple distance specifications
- [`congruence_coeff()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/congruence_coeff.md)
  : Congruence coefficient between two configurations
- [`dist_methods_tbl()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/dist_methods_tbl.md)
  : List available \`manydist\` methods
- [`dist_methods_tbl_cat()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/dist_methods_tbl_cat.md)
  : List available categorical dissimilarities
- [`fifa_nl`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/fifa_nl.md)
  : FIFA 21 Player Data - Dutch League
- [`gen_mixed()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/gen_mixed.md)
  : Generate mixed-type clustering data with signal and noise
- [`generate_dataset()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/generate_dataset.md)
  : generate toy mixed datasets for the supplementary material: figures
  1 to 3
- [`lovo_mdist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/lovo_mdist.md)
  : Leave-one-variable-out diagnostics for distance-based variable
  importance
- [`lovo_method_spec()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/lovo_method_spec.md)
  : Create a LOVO method specification for \`compare_lovo_mdist()\`
- [`make_mdist_recipe()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/make_mdist_recipe.md)
  : Build a recipe that computes mdist-based distance features
- [`mdist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/mdist.md)
  : Mixed-type dissimilarities for distance-based learning
- [`mdist_summary_impl()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/mdist_summary_impl.md)
  : Internal: summary method implementation for MDist R6 objects
- [`pam_dist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/pam_dist.md)
  : PAM clustering specification based on manydist dissimilarities
- [`response_aware_methods()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/response_aware_methods.md)
  : List response-aware methods
- [`spectral_dist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/spectral_dist.md)
  : Spectral clustering specification based on manydist dissimilarities
- [`spectral_from_dist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/spectral_from_dist.md)
  : Spectral clustering from a distance matrix
- [`step_mdist()`](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/reference/step_mdist.md)
  : Add manydist dissimilarities to a recipe

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [manydist: distance-based learning with mixed-type
  data](https://alfonsoiodicedenza.github.io/manydist/articles/manydist_vignette.md):
